Immunarch JHU analysis

Author

Santiago Mendoza

1 Setup

Code 
# =========================================================
# CONFIGURACIÓN INICIAL
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# LIBRERÍAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

library(immunarch) 
library(dplyr) 
library(ggplot2) 
library(readr) 
library(stringr) 
library(tidyr) 
library(igraph)
library(purrr) 
library(pheatmap)
library(reshape2)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# RUTAS DE ARCHIVOS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

airr_folder <- "D:/BASH/airr" 
metadata_file <- "D:/BASH/airr/metadata.txt"


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIÓN DE RUTAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

file.exists(metadata_file) 
[1] TRUE
Code 
dir.exists(airr_folder)
[1] TRUE
Code

# CARGA DE METADATA
# ---------------------------------------------------------

meta <- read.delim(metadata_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

2 SRR26304781_airr Negative            HP      NC   male Whole blood
3 SRR26304782_airr Negative            HP      NC female Whole blood
4 SRR26304783_airr Negative             B      IC female Whole blood
5 SRR26304784_airr Negative            HP      NC female Whole blood
6 SRR26304785_airr Negative             B      IC   male Whole blood

2 Parche seqCluster

Code 
# =========================================================
# PARCHE SEQCLUSTER
# =========================================================

seqCluster_fixed <- function(.data,
                             .dist,
                             .perc_similarity,
                             .nt_similarity,
                             .fixed_threshold = 10) {
  
  if (!requireNamespace("igraph", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'igraph' is required.")
  }
  if (!requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'dplyr' is required.")
  }
  if (!requireNamespace("purrr", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'purrr' is required.")
  }
  if (!requireNamespace("tidyr", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'tidyr' is required.")
  }
  
  grouping_cols <- attr(.dist, "group_by")
  matching_col  <- attr(.dist, "col")
  
  if (is.null(grouping_cols)) {
    stop("Attribute 'group_by' not found in .dist")
  }
  if (is.null(matching_col)) {
    stop("Attribute 'col' not found in .dist")
  }
  
  if (length(.data) != length(.dist)) {
    stop(".data and .dist lengths do not match!")
  }
  
  .dist <- .dist[order(match(names(.dist), names(.data)))]
  
  nt_similarity_fun   <- function(x, t = .nt_similarity) x / t
  perc_similarity_fun <- function(x, t = .perc_similarity) x * (1 - t)
  fixed_threshold_fun <- function(x, t = .fixed_threshold) rep(t, length(x))
  
  .threshold_fun <- NULL
  if (!missing(.nt_similarity)) {
    .threshold_fun <- nt_similarity_fun
  }
  if (!missing(.perc_similarity)) {
    .threshold_fun <- perc_similarity_fun
  }
  if (!missing(.fixed_threshold) && is.null(.threshold_fun)) {
    .threshold_fun <- fixed_threshold_fun
  }
  
  if (is.null(.threshold_fun)) {
    stop("You must provide one threshold rule.")
  }
  
  graph_clustering <- function(dist_list, threshold_fun) {
    
    seq_labels <- purrr::map(dist_list, ~ attr(.x, "Labels"))
    singleseq_flag <- purrr::map_lgl(seq_labels, ~ length(.x) == 1)
    seq_length <- purrr::map(seq_labels, nchar)
    threshold <- purrr::map(seq_length, threshold_fun)
    
    group_values <- purrr::map_dfr(dist_list, ~ attr(.x, "group_values"))
    
    protocluster_names <- group_values %>%
      tidyr::unite(col = "protocluster_name", dplyr::all_of(grouping_cols), sep = "/", remove = FALSE) %>%
      dplyr::pull(protocluster_name)
    
    # ---- Caso: grupos con una sola secuencia ----
    result_single <- data.frame(
      Sequence = unlist(seq_labels[singleseq_flag]),
      Cluster = paste0(
        protocluster_names[singleseq_flag],
        "_length_",
        unlist(seq_length[singleseq_flag])
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # ---- Caso: grupos con múltiples secuencias ----
    multiseq_dist <- dist_list[!singleseq_flag]
    
    if (length(multiseq_dist) == 0) {
      res <- result_single
      colnames(res)[1] <- matching_col
      return(res)
    }
    
    result_multi <- purrr::map2(
      seq_along(multiseq_dist),
      multiseq_dist,
      function(idx, dobj) {
        
        mat <- as.matrix(dobj)
        labels <- rownames(mat)
        if (is.null(labels)) {
          labels <- attr(dobj, "Labels")
        }
        
        lengths_here <- nchar(labels)
        thr_here <- threshold_fun(lengths_here)
        
        # si los thresholds difieren dentro del grupo, usamos el máximo
        thr_value <- max(thr_here, na.rm = TRUE)
        
        # conservar solo conexiones por debajo o igual al threshold
        adj <- mat
        adj[adj > thr_value] <- NA
        diag(adj) <- 0
        
        edges <- reshape2::melt(adj, na.rm = TRUE)
        colnames(edges) <- c("from", "to", "distance")
        
        # quitar self-loops explícitos
        edges <- edges[edges$from != edges$to, , drop = FALSE]
        
        # si no hay edges, cada secuencia es su propio cluster
        if (nrow(edges) == 0) {
          length_value <- if (length(unique(lengths_here)) == 1) {
            as.character(unique(lengths_here))
          } else {
            paste0("range_", min(lengths_here), ":", max(lengths_here))
          }
          
          return(data.frame(
            Sequence = labels,
            Cluster = paste0(
              protocluster_names[!singleseq_flag][idx],
              "_length_",
              length_value,
              "_cluster_",
              seq_along(labels)
            ),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          ))
        }
        
        g <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(
          d = edges[, c("from", "to")],
          directed = FALSE,
          vertices = data.frame(name = labels, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        )
        
        comp <- igraph::components(g)$membership
        
        comp_df <- data.frame(
          Sequence = names(comp),
          component_id = as.integer(comp),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        
        length_value <- if (length(unique(lengths_here)) == 1) {
          as.character(unique(lengths_here))
        } else {
          paste0("range_", min(lengths_here), ":", max(lengths_here))
        }
        
        comp_df <- comp_df %>%
          dplyr::group_by(component_id) %>%
          dplyr::mutate(
            Cluster = paste0(
              protocluster_names[!singleseq_flag][idx],
              "_length_",
              length_value,
              "_cluster_",
              dplyr::cur_group_id()
            )
          ) %>%
          dplyr::ungroup() %>%
          dplyr::select(Sequence, Cluster)
        
        comp_df
      }
    )
    
    result_multi <- dplyr::bind_rows(result_multi)
    res <- dplyr::bind_rows(result_single, result_multi)
    
    colnames(res)[1] <- matching_col
    res
  }
  
  clusters <- purrr::map(.dist, ~ graph_clustering(.x, threshold_fun = .threshold_fun))
  
  result_data <- purrr::map2(
    .data,
    clusters,
    ~ dplyr::left_join(.x, .y, by = matching_col)
  )
  
  return(result_data)
}

3 Preprocesamiento airr

Code 
# =========================================================
# PREPROCESAMIENTO DE ARCHIVOS AIRR
# =========================================================

folder_path <- "D:/BASH/airr"

files <- list.files(path = folder_path, pattern = "_airr\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

for (file in files) {
  df <- read.delim(file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  if ("productive" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df[df$productive == TRUE, ]
  }

  if ("consensus_count" %in% names(df)) {
    names(df)[names(df) == "consensus_count"] <- "duplicate_count"
  }

  write.table(df, file = file, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
}

4 Carga de Metadata

Code 
# =========================================================
# CARGA DE METADATA
# =========================================================

meta <- readr::read_tsv(
  "D:/BASH/airr/metadata.txt",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

head(meta)
# A tibble: 6 × 6

3 SRR26304782_airr Negative HP            NC      female Whole blood
4 SRR26304783_airr Negative B             IC      female Whole blood
5 SRR26304784_airr Negative HP            NC      female Whole blood
6 SRR26304785_airr Negative B             IC      male   Whole blood

[5] "sex"           "source"

5 Carga de Repertorios y QC Inicial

Code 
# =========================================================
# CARGA DE DATOS Y QC INICIAL
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CARGA DE DATOS (AIRR)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Repload
immdata <- repLoad("D:/BASH/airr")


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# LIMPIEZA DE ANOTACIONES (MiXCR)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

immdata$data <- lapply(immdata$data, function(x) {
  if ("V.name" %in% colnames(x)) {
    x$V.name <- gsub("\\(.*?\\)", "", x$V.name)
    x$V.name <- sub(",.*", "", x$V.name)
  }
  
  if ("J.name" %in% colnames(x)) {
    x$J.name <- gsub("\\(.*?\\)", "", x$J.name)
    x$J.name <- sub(",.*", "", x$J.name)
  }
  
  if ("C.name" %in% colnames(x)) {
    x$C.name <- gsub("\\(.*?\\)", "", x$C.name)
    x$C.name <- sub(",.*", "", x$C.name)
  }
  
  x
})


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# QC INICIAL POR NÚMERO DE READS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

immdata_raw <- immdata
meta_raw <- immdata$meta

# Contar reads por muestra
rows_per_sample <- sapply(immdata_raw$data, nrow)

qc_reads <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(rows_per_sample),
  n_reads = as.numeric(rows_per_sample),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Unir con metadata
qc_reads <- qc_reads %>%
  left_join(meta_raw, by = "Sample")


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# INSPECCIÓN QC
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Ver primeras filas
head(qc_reads)
        Sample n_reads   chagas cardiac_stage cm_type    sex      source
1 10112-1_airr    7138 Positive             A      NC female Whole blood
2 10115-1_airr    7722 Positive             A      NC   male Whole blood
3 10145-1_airr    2637 Positive             B     CCC female Whole blood
4 10197-1_airr    2756 Positive             B     CCC   male Whole blood
5 10204-1_airr    1797 Positive             B     CCC   male Whole blood
6 10206-1_airr   13016 Positive             A      NC   male Whole blood
Code 
# Resumen general
summary(qc_reads$n_reads)
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
     37    1294    2629    3481    4401   62424
Code 
# Cuántas muestras
nrow(qc_reads)
[1] 351
Code 
# Ordenar de menor a mayor
qc_reads_sorted <- qc_reads %>%
  arrange(n_reads)

# Ver las más bajas
head(qc_reads_sorted, 20)

5 10204-1_airr Positive             B     CCC   male Whole blood
6 10206-1_airr Positive             A      NC   male Whole blood

6 Filtro por Número de Reads

Code 
# =========================================================
# FILTRADO POR PROFUNDIDAD DE SECUENCIACIÓN
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DEFINICIÓN DEL UMBRAL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

threshold <- 500


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# SELECCIÓN DE MUESTRAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

samples_keep <- qc_reads %>%
  filter(n_reads >= threshold) %>%
  pull(Sample)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CONSTRUCCIÓN DEL OBJETO FILTRADO
# ---------------------------------------------------------

immdata_qc <- list(
  data = immdata_raw$data[samples_keep],
  meta = immdata_raw$meta %>%
    dplyr::filter(Sample %in% samples_keep)
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIONES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

length(immdata_raw$data)
[1] 350
Code 
length(immdata_qc$data)
[1] 305
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VALIDACIÓN DE PROFUNDIDAD
# ---------------------------------------------------------

sapply(immdata_qc$data, nrow) %>%
  summary()
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
    521    1719    2973    3977    4755   62424

7 Curación y Estandarización de Metadata Post-QC

Code 
# =========================================================
# CURACIÓN Y ESTANDARIZACIÓN DE METADATA POST QC
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CARGA DE METADATA
# ---------------------------------------------------------

meta_qc <- immdata_qc$meta


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# INSPECCIÓN INICIAL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

colnames(meta_qc)
[1] "Sample"        "chagas"        "cardiac_stage" "cm_type"      
[5] "sex"           "source"
Code 
dim(meta_qc)
[1] 305   6
Code 
head(meta_qc)
        Sample   chagas cardiac_stage cm_type    sex      source
1 10112-1_airr Positive             A      NC female Whole blood
2 10115-1_airr Positive             A      NC   male Whole blood
3 10145-1_airr Positive             B     CCC female Whole blood
4 10197-1_airr Positive             B     CCC   male Whole blood
5 10204-1_airr Positive             B     CCC   male Whole blood
6 10206-1_airr Positive             A      NC   male Whole blood
Code 
str(meta_qc)
'data.frame':   305 obs. of  6 variables:
 $ Sample       : chr  "10112-1_airr" "10115-1_airr" "10145-1_airr" "10197-1_airr" ...
 $ chagas       : chr  "Positive" "Positive" "Positive" "Positive" ...
 $ cardiac_stage: chr  "A" "A" "B" "B" ...
 $ cm_type      : chr  "NC" "NC" "CCC" "CCC" ...
 $ sex          : chr  "female" "male" "female" "male" ...
 $ source       : chr  "Whole blood" "Whole blood" "Whole blood" "Whole blood" ...
Code 
colSums(is.na(meta_qc))
       Sample        chagas cardiac_stage       cm_type           sex 
            0             1             1             1             1 
       source 
            1
Code 
sapply(meta_qc, function(x) sum(x == "", na.rm = TRUE))
       Sample        chagas cardiac_stage       cm_type           sex 
            0             0             0             0             0 
       source 
            0
Code 
sum(duplicated(meta_qc$Sample))
[1] 0
Code 
meta_qc$Sample[duplicated(meta_qc$Sample)]
character(0)
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ALINEACIÓN CON LOS DATOS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

meta_qc <- meta_qc %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(names(immdata_qc$data), Sample))


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIONES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

identical(meta_qc$Sample, names(immdata_qc$data))
[1] TRUE
Code 
length(names(immdata_qc$data))
[1] 305
Code 
nrow(meta_qc)
[1] 305
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ACTUALIZACIÓN DEL OBJETO FINAL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

immdata_qc$meta <- meta_qc

8 Aislamiento de Cadenas Pesadas

Code 
# =========================================================
# AISLAMIENTO DE CADENAS PESADAS
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# OBJETO PRINCIPAL (NUCLEÓTIDOS)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Construcción del objeto filtrado en nt
bcr_nt_data <- lapply(immdata_qc$data, function(x)
  x %>%
    mutate(
      CDR3.nt = as.character(CDR3.nt),
      CDR3.aa = as.character(CDR3.aa),
      V.name  = as.character(V.name),
      J.name  = as.character(J.name),
      D.name  = as.character(D.name)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      grepl("^IGH", V.name) |
      grepl("^IGH", D.name) |
      grepl("^IGH", J.name)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(CDR3.nt), CDR3.nt != "",
      !is.na(V.name),  V.name  != "",
      !is.na(J.name),  J.name  != ""
    )
)

bcr_nt_igdata <- list(
  data = bcr_nt_data,
  meta = immdata_qc$meta
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ELIMINACIÓN DE MUESTRAS VACÍAS (NT)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

non_empty_nt <- names(bcr_nt_igdata$data)[sapply(bcr_nt_igdata$data, nrow) > 0]

bcr_nt_igdata <- list(
  data = bcr_nt_igdata$data[non_empty_nt],
  meta = bcr_nt_igdata$meta %>%
    filter(Sample %in% non_empty_nt) %>%
    slice(match(non_empty_nt, Sample))
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIONES (NT)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

length(bcr_nt_igdata$data)
[1] 305
Code 
summary(sapply(bcr_nt_igdata$data, nrow))
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
     38     565     958    1609    1539   62424
Code 
table(sapply(bcr_nt_igdata$data, nrow) == 0)

FALSE 
  305
Code 
identical(names(bcr_nt_igdata$data), bcr_nt_igdata$meta$Sample)
[1] TRUE

[1] 305
Code

[1] 7138
Code 
nrow(bcr_nt_igdata$data[[1]])
[1] 2869
Code 
unique(substr(bcr_nt_igdata$data[[1]]$V.name, 1, 3))
[1] "IGH"
Code 
unique(substr(bcr_nt_igdata$data[[1]]$D.name, 1, 3))
[1] "IGH" NA
Code 
unique(substr(bcr_nt_igdata$data[[1]]$J.name, 1, 3))
[1] "IGH"
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# OBJETO PARA CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS (AMINOÁCIDOS)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Construcción del objeto en aa
bcr_public_aa_list <- lapply(immdata_qc$data, function(x) 
  x %>%
    mutate(
      CDR3.aa = as.character(CDR3.aa),
      CDR3.nt = as.character(CDR3.nt),
      V.name  = as.character(V.name),
      J.name  = as.character(J.name),
      D.name  = as.character(D.name)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      grepl("^IGH", V.name) |
      grepl("^IGH", D.name) |
      grepl("^IGH", J.name)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(CDR3.aa), CDR3.aa != "",
      !is.na(V.name),  V.name  != "",
      !is.na(J.name),  J.name  != ""
    )
)

bcr_public_aa_igdata <- list(
  data = bcr_public_aa_list,
  meta = immdata_qc$meta
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ELIMINACIÓN DE MUESTRAS VACÍAS (AA)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

non_empty_aa <- names(bcr_public_aa_igdata$data)[sapply(bcr_public_aa_igdata$data, nrow) > 0]

bcr_public_aa_igdata <- list(
  data = bcr_public_aa_igdata$data[non_empty_aa],
  meta = bcr_public_aa_igdata$meta %>%
    filter(Sample %in% non_empty_aa) %>%
    slice(match(non_empty_aa, Sample))
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIONES (AA)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

length(bcr_public_aa_igdata$data)
[1] 305
Code 
summary(sapply(bcr_public_aa_igdata$data, nrow))
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
     38     565     958    1609    1539   62424
Code 
identical(names(bcr_public_aa_igdata$data), bcr_public_aa_igdata$meta$Sample)
[1] TRUE

9 Distancias Secuenciales y Clustering en Nucleotidos

Code 
# =========================================================
# CLUSTERING (NUCLEÓTIDOS)
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CÁLCULO DE DISTANCIAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Ejecutar seqDist en nt
distBCR_nt <- seqDist(
  bcr_nt_igdata$data,
  .col = "CDR3.nt",
  .group_by = c("V.name", "J.name"),
  .group_by_seqLength = FALSE
)

# Verificaciones
class(distBCR_nt)
[1] "list"
Code 
length(distBCR_nt)
[1] 305
Code 
names(distBCR_nt)[1:5]
[1] "10112-1_airr" "10115-1_airr" "10145-1_airr" "10197-1_airr" "10204-1_airr"
Code 
length(distBCR_nt) == length(bcr_nt_igdata$data)
[1] TRUE
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CLUSTERING
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Clustering en nt
clustBCR_nt <- seqCluster_fixed(
  bcr_nt_igdata$data,
  distBCR_nt,
  .perc_similarity = 0.85
)

# Verificaciones iniciales
head(clustBCR_nt[[1]])

2     29 0.001806178
3     24 0.001494768
4     24 0.001494768
5     22 0.001370204

  cat("\nMuestra:", nm, "\n")
  cat("n filas:", nrow(clustBCR_nt[[nm]]), "\n")
  cat("n clusters:", length(unique(clustBCR_nt[[nm]]$Cluster)), "\n")
}

Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CONSTRUCCIÓN DEL OBJETO FINAL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

bcr_clustered_nt <- list(
  data = clustBCR_nt,
  meta = bcr_nt_igdata$meta
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ALINEACIÓN DE METADATA
# ---------------------------------------------------------

if (!identical(names(bcr_clustered_nt$data), bcr_clustered_nt$meta$Sample)) {
  bcr_clustered_nt$meta <- bcr_clustered_nt$meta %>%
    dplyr::slice(match(names(bcr_clustered_nt$data), Sample))
}

identical(names(bcr_clustered_nt$data), bcr_clustered_nt$meta$Sample)
[1] TRUE
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIONES BÁSICAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# QC DEL CLUSTERING
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Resumen de clusters por muestra
cluster_summary_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(bcr_clustered_nt$data),
  n_sequences = sapply(bcr_clustered_nt$data, nrow),
  n_clusters = sapply(
    bcr_clustered_nt$data,
    function(df) length(unique(df$Cluster))
  )
)

summary(cluster_summary_nt$n_clusters)
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
     33     470     766    1102    1291   22258

10 Colapso por Cluster en Full

Code 
# =========================================================
# COLAPSO POR CLUSTER EN FULL
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# RAMA FULL (NUCLEÓTIDOS)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

clustered_bcr_nt_data <- list()

# Verificar que todas las muestras tengan columna Cluster
all(sapply(bcr_clustered_nt$data, function(df) "Cluster" %in% colnames(df)))
[1] TRUE
Code 
for (i in seq_along(bcr_clustered_nt$data)) {
  name <- names(bcr_clustered_nt$data)[[i]]
  x <- bcr_clustered_nt$data[[i]]

  clustered_bcr_nt_data[[name]] <- x %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Cluster) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~{
      rep_row <- .x %>%
        dplyr::slice_max(order_by = Clones, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)

      dplyr::tibble(
        Clones  = sum(.x$Clones, na.rm = TRUE),
        V.name  = rep_row$V.name[1],
        J.name  = rep_row$J.name[1],
        CDR3.nt = rep_row$CDR3.nt[1],
        CDR3.aa = rep_row$CDR3.aa[1]
      )
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Proportion = Clones / sum(Clones)
    )
}

# Construir objeto final colapsado
clustered_bcr_nt <- list(
  data = clustered_bcr_nt_data,
  meta = bcr_clustered_nt$meta
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ALINEACIÓN DE METADATA
# ---------------------------------------------------------

if (!identical(names(clustered_bcr_nt$data), clustered_bcr_nt$meta$Sample)) {
  clustered_bcr_nt$meta <- clustered_bcr_nt$meta %>%
    dplyr::slice(match(names(clustered_bcr_nt$data), Sample))
}

# Verificación de alineación
identical(names(clustered_bcr_nt$data), clustered_bcr_nt$meta$Sample)
[1] TRUE
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIONES BÁSICAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

names(clustered_bcr_nt)
[1] "data" "meta"

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# QC DEL COLAPSO POR CLUSTER
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Proporción por muestra
check_cluster_prop_nt <- sapply(
  clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  function(df) sum(df$Proportion, na.rm = TRUE)
)

range(check_cluster_prop_nt, na.rm = TRUE)
[1] 1 1

  Sample = names(clustered_bcr_nt$data),
  n_clusters = sapply(clustered_bcr_nt$data, nrow)
)

# Comparación antes vs después del colapso
comparison_counts_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(bcr_clustered_nt$data),
  before = sapply(bcr_clustered_nt$data[names(bcr_clustered_nt$data)], nrow),
  after  = sapply(clustered_bcr_nt$data[names(bcr_clustered_nt$data)], nrow)
)

head(comparison_counts_nt)
                   Sample before after

10204-1_airr 10204-1_airr    700   611

   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
     33     470     766    1102    1291   22258
Code 
# Confirmar consistencia de clusters
cluster_unique_check_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(bcr_clustered_nt$data),
  n_unique_clusters = sapply(
    bcr_clustered_nt$data,
    function(df) length(unique(df$Cluster))
  ),
  n_collapsed_rows = sapply(clustered_bcr_nt$data, nrow)
)

head(cluster_unique_check_nt)
                   Sample n_unique_clusters n_collapsed_rows

10115-1_airr 10115-1_airr              3209             3209
10145-1_airr 10145-1_airr               675              675
10197-1_airr 10197-1_airr               886              886
10204-1_airr 10204-1_airr               611              611
10206-1_airr 10206-1_airr              2814             2814
Code 
summary(cluster_unique_check_nt$n_unique_clusters - cluster_unique_check_nt$n_collapsed_rows)
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
      0       0       0       0       0       0

11 Downsampling

Code 
# =========================================================
# DOWNSAMPLING
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DOWNSAMPLING SOBRE DATOS CLUSTERIZADOS (NT)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

set.seed(1234)

downsampled_bcr_nt <- repSample(
  bcr_clustered_nt$data,
  .method = "downsample"
)

down_bcr_nt_igdata <- list(
  data = downsampled_bcr_nt,
  meta = bcr_clustered_nt$meta
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIONES BÁSICAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

length(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data)
[1] 305

sizes_before_nt <- sapply(bcr_clustered_nt$data, nrow)
sizes_after_nt  <- sapply(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data, nrow)

summary(sizes_before_nt)
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
     38     571     978    1688    1568   67968
Code 
summary(sizes_after_nt)
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
   30.0   107.0   117.0   111.9   123.0   130.0
Code

[1] 0
Code

Code

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# QC DEL DOWNSAMPLING
# ---------------------------------------------------------

downsample_qc_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(bcr_clustered_nt$data),
  n_before = sapply(bcr_clustered_nt$data, nrow),
  n_after  = sapply(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data, nrow)
)

downsample_qc_nt <- downsample_qc_nt[order(downsample_qc_nt$n_before), ]

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIÓN DE ALINEAMIENTO CON METADATA
# ---------------------------------------------------------

if (!identical(names(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data), down_bcr_nt_igdata$meta$Sample)) {
  down_bcr_nt_igdata$meta <- down_bcr_nt_igdata$meta %>%
    dplyr::slice(match(names(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data), Sample))
}

identical(names(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data), down_bcr_nt_igdata$meta$Sample)
[1] TRUE

12 Colapso por Cluster en Downsampled

Code 
# =========================================================
# COLAPSO POR CLUSTER EN DOWNSAMPLED
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# RAMA DOWNSAMPLED EN NUCLEÓTIDOS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

down_clustered_bcr_nt_data <- list()

# Verificar que todas las muestras tengan columna Cluster
all(sapply(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data, function(df) "Cluster" %in% colnames(df)))
[1] TRUE
Code 
for (i in seq_along(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data)) {
  name <- names(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data)[[i]]
  x <- down_bcr_nt_igdata$data[[i]]

  down_clustered_bcr_nt_data[[name]] <- x %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Cluster) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~{
      rep_row <- .x %>%
        dplyr::slice_max(order_by = Clones, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)

      dplyr::tibble(
        Clones  = sum(.x$Clones, na.rm = TRUE),
        V.name  = rep_row$V.name[1],
        J.name  = rep_row$J.name[1],
        CDR3.nt = rep_row$CDR3.nt[1],
        CDR3.aa = rep_row$CDR3.aa[1]
      )
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Proportion = Clones / sum(Clones)
    )
}

# Construir objeto final colapsado
down_clustered_bcr_nt <- list(
  data = down_clustered_bcr_nt_data,
  meta = down_bcr_nt_igdata$meta
)

# Alinear metadata
if (!identical(names(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data), down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta$Sample)) {
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta <- down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta %>%
    dplyr::slice(match(names(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data), Sample))
}


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# VERIFICACIONES BÁSICAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

identical(names(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data), down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta$Sample)
[1] TRUE

# QC DEL COLAPSO POR CLUSTER

# Proporción por muestra
check_down_cluster_prop_nt <- sapply(
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  function(df) sum(df$Proportion, na.rm = TRUE)
)

range(check_down_cluster_prop_nt, na.rm = TRUE)

# Número de clusters por muestra
down_cluster_counts_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data),
  n_clusters = sapply(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data, nrow)
)

# Comparación antes vs después del colapso
comparison_counts_down_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data),
  before = sapply(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data[names(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data)], nrow),
  after  = sapply(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data[names(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data)], nrow)
)

# Confirmar que el número de clusters colapsados coincide con el número de clusters únicos por muestra
cluster_unique_check_down_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(down_bcr_nt_igdata$data),
  n_unique_clusters = sapply(
    down_bcr_nt_igdata$data,
    function(df) length(unique(df$Cluster))
  ),
  n_collapsed_rows = sapply(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data, nrow)
)

13 EXPANSIÓN CLONAL

Code 
# =========================================================
# EXPANSIÓN CLONAL
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# QC / DIAGNÓSTICO DE DISTRIBUCIÓN CLONAL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

clone_size_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(names(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data), function(sample_id) {

    df <- down_clustered_bcr_nt$data[[sample_id]]

    if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

    total_clones <- sum(df$Clones, na.rm = TRUE)

    df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        Sample = sample_id,
        clone_size = Clones,
        clone_proportion = dplyr::if_else(
          total_clones > 0,
          Clones / total_clones,
          NA_real_
        )
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        Sample,
        Cluster,
        clone_size,
        clone_proportion
      )
  })
)

clone_size_summary <- clone_size_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_clusters = dplyr::n(),
    min_prop = min(clone_proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25_prop = quantile(clone_proportion, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_prop = median(clone_proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75_prop = quantile(clone_proportion, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    q90_prop = quantile(clone_proportion, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    q95_prop = quantile(clone_proportion, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_prop = max(clone_proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# FIGURAS DIAGNÓSTICAS
p_clone_hist <- ggplot(clone_size_df, aes(x = clone_proportion)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribución global de proporciones clonales",
    x = "Proporción del clon dentro de la muestra",
    y = "Número de clusters"
  )

p_clone_box <- ggplot(clone_size_df, aes(y = clone_proportion)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribución global de proporciones clonales",
    y = "Proporción del clon"
  )

p_clone_hist_log <- ggplot(clone_size_df, aes(x = clone_proportion)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribución global de proporciones clonales (escala log10)",
    x = "Proporción del clon (log10)",
    y = "Número de clusters"
  )

p_clone_hist
Code 
p_clone_box
Code 
p_clone_hist_log
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# EXPANSIÓN CLONAL FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

imm_hom_full_nt <- repClonality(
  clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  .method = "homeo",
  .clone.types = c(
    Small = 0.01,
    Medium = 0.05,
    Large = 0.1,
    Hyperexpanded = 1
  )
)

imm_hom_meta_full_nt <- merge(
  imm_hom_full_nt,
  clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by.x = "row.names",
  by.y = "Sample"
)

long_hom_full_nt <- imm_hom_meta_full_nt %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      "Small (0 < X <= 0.01)",
      "Medium (0.01 < X <= 0.05)",
      "Large (0.05 < X <= 0.1)",
      "Hyperexpanded (0.1 < X <= 1)"
    ),
    names_to = "CloneSize",
    values_to = "Proportion"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    CloneSize = factor(
      CloneSize,
      levels = c(
        "Small (0 < X <= 0.01)",
        "Medium (0.01 < X <= 0.05)",
        "Large (0.05 < X <= 0.1)",
        "Hyperexpanded (0.1 < X <= 1)"
      )
    ),
    Proportion = as.numeric(Proportion)
  )

# QC FULL: cada muestra debe sumar 1
check_hom_full_nt <- long_hom_full_nt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Row.names) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    sum_prop = sum(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stopifnot(all(abs(check_hom_full_nt$sum_prop - 1) < 1e-8))


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# EXPANSIÓN CLONAL DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

imm_hom_down_nt <- repClonality(
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  .method = "homeo",
  .clone.types = c(
    Small = 0.01,
    Medium = 0.05,
    Large = 0.1,
    Hyperexpanded = 1
  )
)

imm_hom_meta_down_nt <- merge(
  imm_hom_down_nt,
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by.x = "row.names",
  by.y = "Sample"
)

long_hom_down_nt <- imm_hom_meta_down_nt %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      "Small (0 < X <= 0.01)",
      "Medium (0.01 < X <= 0.05)",
      "Large (0.05 < X <= 0.1)",
      "Hyperexpanded (0.1 < X <= 1)"
    ),
    names_to = "CloneSize",
    values_to = "Proportion"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    CloneSize = factor(
      CloneSize,
      levels = c(
        "Small (0 < X <= 0.01)",
        "Medium (0.01 < X <= 0.05)",
        "Large (0.05 < X <= 0.1)",
        "Hyperexpanded (0.1 < X <= 1)"
      )
    ),
    Proportion = as.numeric(Proportion)
  )

# QC DOWNSAMPLED: cada muestra debe sumar 1
check_hom_down_nt <- long_hom_down_nt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Row.names) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    sum_prop = sum(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stopifnot(all(abs(check_hom_down_nt$sum_prop - 1) < 1e-8))


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# COLAPSO SMALL VS EXPANDED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

long_hom_full_nt_collapsed <- long_hom_full_nt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    CloneSize = dplyr::case_when(
      CloneSize == "Small (0 < X <= 0.01)" ~ "Small",
      TRUE ~ "Expanded"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    Row.names,
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source,
    CloneSize
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Proportion = sum(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

long_hom_down_nt_collapsed <- long_hom_down_nt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    CloneSize = dplyr::case_when(
      CloneSize == "Small (0 < X <= 0.01)" ~ "Small",
      TRUE ~ "Expanded"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    Row.names,
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source,
    CloneSize
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Proportion = sum(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# RESÚMENES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

hom_summary_master_full_nt <- long_hom_full_nt_collapsed %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source,
    CloneSize
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_prop = median(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_prop = sd(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_prop = min(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_prop = max(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_rows = dplyr::n(),
    n_samples = dplyr::n_distinct(Row.names),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

hom_summary_master_down_nt <- long_hom_down_nt_collapsed %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source,
    CloneSize
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_prop = median(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_prop = sd(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_prop = min(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_prop = max(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_rows = dplyr::n(),
    n_samples = dplyr::n_distinct(Row.names),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DATOS PARA VISUALIZACIÓN
# ---------------------------------------------------------

long_hom_full_nt_plot <- long_hom_full_nt_collapsed %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = as.character(cardiac_stage)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !(source == "Heart" & cardiac_stage %in% c("A", "B", "HP"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = factor(cardiac_stage),
    cardiac_stage = droplevels(cardiac_stage)
  )

long_hom_down_nt_plot <- long_hom_down_nt_collapsed %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = as.character(cardiac_stage)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !(source == "Heart" & cardiac_stage %in% c("A", "B", "HP"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = factor(cardiac_stage),
    cardiac_stage = droplevels(cardiac_stage)
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# GRÁFICAS INTEGRADAS PRINCIPALES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# FULL - boxplot integrada
p_homeo_integrated_all_full <- ggplot(
  long_hom_full_nt_plot %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = Proportion, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(CloneSize ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") + scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Expansión clonal (FULL) por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Proporción"
  )

p_homeo_integrated_all_full
Code 
# DOWNSAMPLED - boxplot integrada
p_homeo_integrated_all <- ggplot(
  long_hom_down_nt_plot %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = Proportion, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(CloneSize ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") + scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Expansión clonal por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Proporción"
  )

p_homeo_integrated_all
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# GRÁFICAS DE RESUMEN PROMEDIO
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# FULL
homeo_summary_plot_all_full <- long_hom_full_nt_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(chagas, cardiac_stage, source, sex, CloneSize) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_homeo_summary_all_full <- ggplot(
  homeo_summary_plot_all_full,
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = mean_prop, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_prop - se, ymax = mean_prop + se),
    width = 0.2,
    position = position_dodge(0.9)
  ) +
  facet_grid(CloneSize ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") + scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Expansión clonal promedio (FULL) por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Proporción media"
  )

p_homeo_summary_all_full
Code 
# DOWNSAMPLED
homeo_summary_plot_all <- long_hom_down_nt_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(chagas, cardiac_stage, source, sex, CloneSize) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_homeo_summary_all <- ggplot(
  homeo_summary_plot_all,
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = mean_prop, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_prop - se, ymax = mean_prop + se),
    width = 0.2,
    position = position_dodge(0.9)
  ) +
  facet_grid(CloneSize ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") + scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Expansión clonal promedio por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Proporción media"
  )

p_homeo_summary_all
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ANÁLISIS cm_type
# ---------------------------------------------------------

homeo_cm_type_full <- long_hom_full_nt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cm_type, CloneSize) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
   mean_prop = mean(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
   median_prop = median(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
     .groups = "drop"
 )
ggplot(long_hom_full_nt, aes(x = cm_type, y = Proportion, fill = CloneSize)) +
 geom_boxplot() +
 theme_minimal() +
 labs(
   title = "Homeostasis clonal por tipo de cardiomiopatía",
   x = "Tipo de cardiomiopatía",
   y = "Proporción"
 )
Code 
homeo_cm_type_down <- long_hom_down_nt %>%
 dplyr::group_by(cm_type, CloneSize) %>%
 dplyr::summarise(
   mean_prop = mean(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
   median_prop = median(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
   .groups = "drop"
 )

ggplot(long_hom_down_nt, aes(x = cm_type, y = Proportion, fill = CloneSize)) +
 geom_boxplot() +
 theme_minimal() +
 labs(
   title = "Homeostasis clonal por tipo de cardiomiopatía (Downsampled)",
   x = "Tipo de cardiomiopatía",
   y = "Proporción"
 )

14 Diversidad

Code 
# =========================================================
# DIVERSIDAD
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DIVERSIDAD FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Verificación de alineación
stopifnot(identical(names(clustered_bcr_nt$data), clustered_bcr_nt$meta$Sample))

# Resumen de entrada FULL
div_input_summary_full_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(clustered_bcr_nt$data),
  n_clonotypes = sapply(clustered_bcr_nt$data, nrow),
  total_clones = sapply(clustered_bcr_nt$data, function(df) sum(df$Clones, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Cálculo de métricas de diversidad FULL
div_inv_simp_full_nt <- repDiversity(
  clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  "inv.simp",
  .col = "nt+v+j",
  .do.norm = TRUE
)

div_hill_q1_full_nt <- repDiversity(
  clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  "hill",
  .min.q = 1,
  .max.q = 1,
  .col = "nt+v+j"
)

div_gini_full_nt <- repDiversity(
  clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  "gini",
  .col = "nt+v+j"
)

# Unir métricas FULL con metadata
div_inv_simp_meta_full_nt <- merge(
  div_inv_simp_full_nt,
  clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by = "Sample"
)

div_hill_q1_meta_full_nt <- merge(
  div_hill_q1_full_nt,
  clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by = "Sample"
)

div_gini_full_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = rownames(div_gini_full_nt),
  gini = as.numeric(div_gini_full_nt[, 1]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

div_gini_meta_full_nt <- merge(
  div_gini_full_nt,
  clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by = "Sample"
)

# ESTANDARIZAR NOMBRES DE COLUMNAS - FULL
if ("Value" %in% colnames(div_inv_simp_meta_full_nt)) {
  div_inv_simp_meta_full_nt <- div_inv_simp_meta_full_nt %>%
    dplyr::rename(inv_simp = Value)
}

if ("Value" %in% colnames(div_hill_q1_meta_full_nt)) {
  div_hill_q1_meta_full_nt <- div_hill_q1_meta_full_nt %>%
    dplyr::rename(hill_q1 = Value)
}

if ("Q" %in% colnames(div_hill_q1_meta_full_nt)) {
  div_hill_q1_meta_full_nt <- div_hill_q1_meta_full_nt %>%
    dplyr::select(-Q)
}

if ("Value" %in% colnames(div_gini_meta_full_nt)) {
  div_gini_meta_full_nt <- div_gini_meta_full_nt %>%
    dplyr::rename(gini = Value)
}

# Tabla maestra FULL
diversity_master_full_nt <- div_inv_simp_meta_full_nt %>%
  dplyr::select(Sample, inv_simp, chagas, cardiac_stage, cm_type, sex, source) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    div_hill_q1_meta_full_nt %>% dplyr::select(Sample, hill_q1),
    by = "Sample"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    div_gini_meta_full_nt %>% dplyr::select(Sample, gini),
    by = "Sample"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    div_input_summary_full_nt %>% dplyr::select(Sample, n_clonotypes, total_clones),
    by = "Sample"
  )

# QC FULL
stopifnot(nrow(diversity_master_full_nt) == dplyr::n_distinct(diversity_master_full_nt$Sample))

colSums(is.na(diversity_master_full_nt))
       Sample      inv_simp        chagas cardiac_stage       cm_type 
            0             0             1             1             1 
          sex        source       hill_q1          gini  n_clonotypes 
            1             1             0             0             0 
 total_clones 
            0
Code 
diversity_master_full_nt %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    min_inv_simp = min(inv_simp, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_inv_simp = max(inv_simp, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_hill_q1 = min(hill_q1, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_hill_q1 = max(hill_q1, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_gini = min(gini, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_gini = max(gini, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_total_clones = min(total_clones, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_total_clones = max(total_clones, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
  min_inv_simp max_inv_simp min_hill_q1 max_hill_q1  min_gini  max_gini
1     2.520511     854.8314    10.44208    2740.116 0.2197678 0.9762231
  min_total_clones max_total_clones
1              131          3404488
Code 
# Formato largo FULL
diversity_long_full_nt <- diversity_master_full_nt %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(inv_simp, hill_q1, gini),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

# Resumen maestro FULL
div_summary_full_nt <- diversity_long_full_nt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source,
    Metric
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_value = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_value = median(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_value = sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_value = min(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_value = max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_rows = dplyr::n(),
    n_samples = dplyr::n_distinct(Sample),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DIVERSIDAD DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Verificación de alineación
stopifnot(identical(names(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data), down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta$Sample))

# Resumen de entrada DOWNSAMPLED
div_input_summary_down_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = names(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data),
  n_clonotypes = sapply(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data, nrow),
  total_clones = sapply(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data, function(df) sum(df$Clones, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Cálculo de métricas de diversidad DOWNSAMPLED
div_inv_simp_down_nt <- repDiversity(
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  "inv.simp",
  .col = "nt+v+j",
  .do.norm = TRUE
)

div_hill_q1_down_nt <- repDiversity(
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  "hill",
  .min.q = 1,
  .max.q = 1,
  .col = "nt+v+j"
)

div_gini_down_nt <- repDiversity(
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  "gini",
  .col = "nt+v+j"
)

# Riqueza clonotípica estandarizada por downsampling
div_volume_down_nt <- repExplore(
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$data,
  .method = "volume"
)

# Unir métricas DOWNSAMPLED con metadata
div_inv_simp_meta_down_nt <- merge(
  div_inv_simp_down_nt,
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by = "Sample"
)

div_hill_q1_meta_down_nt <- merge(
  div_hill_q1_down_nt,
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by = "Sample"
)

div_gini_down_nt <- data.frame(
  Sample = rownames(div_gini_down_nt),
  gini = as.numeric(div_gini_down_nt[, 1]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

div_gini_meta_down_nt <- merge(
  div_gini_down_nt,
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by = "Sample"
)

div_volume_meta_down_nt <- merge(
  div_volume_down_nt,
  down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta,
  by = "Sample"
)

# ESTANDARIZAR NOMBRES DE COLUMNAS - DOWNSAMPLED
if ("Value" %in% colnames(div_inv_simp_meta_down_nt)) {
  div_inv_simp_meta_down_nt <- div_inv_simp_meta_down_nt %>%
    dplyr::rename(inv_simp = Value)
}

if ("Value" %in% colnames(div_hill_q1_meta_down_nt)) {
  div_hill_q1_meta_down_nt <- div_hill_q1_meta_down_nt %>%
    dplyr::rename(hill_q1 = Value)
}

if ("Q" %in% colnames(div_hill_q1_meta_down_nt)) {
  div_hill_q1_meta_down_nt <- div_hill_q1_meta_down_nt %>%
    dplyr::select(-Q)
}

if ("Value" %in% colnames(div_gini_meta_down_nt)) {
  div_gini_meta_down_nt <- div_gini_meta_down_nt %>%
    dplyr::rename(gini = Value)
}

if ("Volume" %in% colnames(div_volume_meta_down_nt)) {
  div_volume_meta_down_nt <- div_volume_meta_down_nt %>%
    dplyr::rename(volume_downsampled = Volume)
}

# Tabla maestra DOWNSAMPLED
diversity_master_down_nt <- div_inv_simp_meta_down_nt %>%
  dplyr::select(Sample, inv_simp, chagas, cardiac_stage, cm_type, sex, source) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    div_hill_q1_meta_down_nt %>% dplyr::select(Sample, hill_q1),
    by = "Sample"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    div_gini_meta_down_nt %>% dplyr::select(Sample, gini),
    by = "Sample"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    div_volume_meta_down_nt %>% dplyr::select(Sample, volume_downsampled),
    by = "Sample"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    div_input_summary_down_nt %>% dplyr::select(Sample, n_clonotypes, total_clones),
    by = "Sample"
  )

# QC DOWNSAMPLED
stopifnot(nrow(diversity_master_down_nt) == dplyr::n_distinct(diversity_master_down_nt$Sample))

colSums(is.na(diversity_master_down_nt))

           cm_type                sex             source            hill_q1 
                 1                  1                  1                  0 
              gini volume_downsampled       n_clonotypes       total_clones 
                 0                  0                  0                  0

    min_inv_simp = min(inv_simp, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_inv_simp = max(inv_simp, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_hill_q1 = min(hill_q1, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_hill_q1 = max(hill_q1, na.rm = TRUE),

Code 
# Formato largo DOWNSAMPLED
diversity_long_down_nt <- diversity_master_down_nt %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(inv_simp, hill_q1, gini),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

# Resumen maestro DOWNSAMPLED
div_summary_down_nt <- diversity_long_down_nt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source,
    Metric
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_value = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_value = median(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_value = sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_value = min(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_value = max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_rows = dplyr::n(),
    n_samples = dplyr::n_distinct(Sample),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DATOS PARA VISUALIZACIÓN
# ---------------------------------------------------------

diversity_long_full_nt_plot <- diversity_long_full_nt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = as.character(cardiac_stage)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !(source == "Heart" & cardiac_stage %in% c("A", "B", "HP"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = factor(cardiac_stage),
    cardiac_stage = droplevels(cardiac_stage)
  )

diversity_long_down_nt_plot <- diversity_long_down_nt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = as.character(cardiac_stage)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !(source == "Heart" & cardiac_stage %in% c("A", "B", "HP"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = factor(cardiac_stage),
    cardiac_stage = droplevels(cardiac_stage)
  )

diversity_volume_down_nt_plot <- diversity_master_down_nt %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Sample,
    volume_downsampled,
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = as.character(cardiac_stage)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !(source == "Heart" & cardiac_stage %in% c("A", "B", "HP"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = factor(cardiac_stage),
    cardiac_stage = droplevels(cardiac_stage)
  )

# FIGURAS INTEGRADAS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# DIVERSIDAD FULL
p_div_integrated_all_full <- ggplot(
  diversity_long_full_nt_plot %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = Value, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(Metric ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") + scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Diversidad (FULL) por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Valor"
  )

p_div_integrated_all_downsampled <- ggplot(
  diversity_long_down_nt_plot %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = Value, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(Metric ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") + scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +

p_volume_integrated_all <- ggplot(
  diversity_volume_down_nt_plot %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = volume_downsampled, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(. ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") + scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +

    title = "Riqueza clonotípica estandarizada por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo (Downsampled)",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Número de clonotipos únicos tras downsampling"

p_volume_integrated_all

15 Isotipos y Class-Switch

Code 
# =========================================================
# Isotipos y Class-Switch
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Listas de Isotipos
# ---------------------------------------------------------

normalize_isotype <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)
  x <- toupper(x)

  dplyr::case_when(
    x %in% c("IGHM", "IGM") ~ "IGHM",
    x %in% c("IGHD", "IGD") ~ "IGHD",
    x %in% c("IGHE", "IGE") ~ "IGHE",

    x %in% c("IGHA1", "IGA1") ~ "IGHA1",
    x %in% c("IGHA2", "IGA2") ~ "IGHA2",
    x %in% c("IGHA", "IGA") ~ "IGHA",

    x %in% c("IGHG1", "IGG1") ~ "IGHG1",
    x %in% c("IGHG2", "IGG2") ~ "IGHG2",
    x %in% c("IGHG3", "IGG3") ~ "IGHG3",
    x %in% c("IGHG4", "IGG4", "IGHG4A") ~ "IGHG4",
    x %in% c("IGHG", "IGG") ~ "IGHG",

    x %in% c("UNDETERMINED", "NA", "NAN", "") ~ "undetermined",

    x %in% c(
      "CANT_DISTINGUISH",
      "CANNOT_DISTINGUISH",
      "CANTDISTINGUISH",
      "CANNOTDISTINGUISH",
      "IGGP",
      "IGHGP",
      "IGG_P",
      "IGHG_P"
    ) ~ "cant_distinguish",

    is.na(x) ~ "undetermined",

    TRUE ~ x
  )
}

# Buscar archivos AIRR
airr_folder <- "D:/BASH/airr"

process_airr_folder <- function(airr_folder) {
  files <- list.files(
    path = airr_folder,
    pattern = "_airr\\.tsv$",
    full.names = TRUE
  )

  cat("Archivos encontrados:", length(files), "\n")

  airr_list <- list()

  for (file_path in files) {
    sample_id <- sub("_airr\\.tsv$", "", basename(file_path))
    cat("Procesando:", sample_id, "\n")

    df <- readr::read_tsv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

    # Formato AIRR
    if (all(c("productive", "locus", "junction", "c_call") %in% colnames(df))) {
      df <- df %>%
        dplyr::filter(productive == TRUE, locus == "IGH") %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          CDR3.nt = junction,
          isotype = sub("\\*.*", "", c_call),
          isotype = trimws(isotype),
          isotype = dplyr::if_else(
            is.na(isotype) | isotype == "",
            "undetermined",
            isotype
          ),
          isotype = normalize_isotype(isotype)
        )

      airr_list[[sample_id]] <- df
      next
    }
    
# MiXCR renombrado
if (all(c("nSeqCDR3", "bestVHit", "bestJHit", "bestCHit") %in% colnames(df))) {
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      CDR3.nt = nSeqCDR3,
      bestCHit_clean = sub("\\*.*", "", bestCHit),
      bestCHit_clean = trimws(bestCHit_clean),
      bestCHit_clean = gsub("\\s+", "", bestCHit_clean),
      bestCHit_clean = toupper(bestCHit_clean)
    )

  if ("isotype" %in% colnames(df)) {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        isotype_raw = as.character(isotype),
        isotype_raw = trimws(isotype_raw),
        isotype_raw = gsub("\\s+", "", isotype_raw),
        isotype_raw = toupper(isotype_raw)
      )
  } else {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(isotype_raw = NA_character_)
  }

  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      isotype = dplyr::if_else(
        !is.na(bestCHit_clean) & bestCHit_clean != "",
        bestCHit_clean,
        isotype_raw
      ),
      isotype = dplyr::if_else(
        is.na(isotype) | isotype == "",
        "undetermined",
        isotype
      ),
      isotype = normalize_isotype(isotype)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(CDR3.nt), CDR3.nt != "")

  airr_list[[sample_id]] <- df
  next
}
    warning(
      paste(
        "Formato no reconocido en", sample_id,
        "- columnas:",
        paste(colnames(df), collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }

  return(airr_list)
}

airr_list_isotype <- process_airr_folder(airr_folder)
Archivos encontrados: 350 
Procesando: 10112-1 
Procesando: 10115-1 
Procesando: 10145-1 
Procesando: 10197-1 
Procesando: 10204-1

# Mantener solo muestras presentes en immdata_qc
qc_samples <- immdata_qc$meta %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Sample = sub("_airr$", "", Sample)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Sample)

airr_list_isotype <- airr_list_isotype[qc_samples]
airr_list_isotype <- airr_list_isotype[!sapply(airr_list_isotype, is.null)]

# Verificaciones iniciales
length(airr_list_isotype)
[1] 305
Code 
head(names(airr_list_isotype))
[1] "10112-1" "10115-1" "10145-1" "10197-1" "10204-1" "10206-1"
Code 
summary(sapply(airr_list_isotype, nrow))

     41     567     964    1618    1558   62424
Code 
setdiff(names(airr_list_isotype), qc_samples)
