Code 
setdiff(qc_samples, names(airr_list_isotype))
character(0)
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# FUNCIONES AUXILIARES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Detectar columna de abundancia
get_abundance_column <- function(df) {
  if ("duplicate_count" %in% colnames(df)) {
    return("duplicate_count")
  } else if ("consensus_count" %in% colnames(df)) {
    return("consensus_count")
  } else if ("readCount" %in% colnames(df)) {
    return("readCount")
  } else if ("cloneCount" %in% colnames(df)) {
    return("cloneCount")
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Preparar AIRR para análisis read-level
prepare_isotype_readlevel <- function(airr_list) {
  prepared_list <- lapply(names(airr_list), function(sample_id) {
    df <- airr_list[[sample_id]]

    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

    if (!"isotype" %in% colnames(df)) {
      warning(paste("La muestra", sample_id, "no tiene columna isotype"))
      return(NULL)
    }

    abundance_col <- get_abundance_column(df)

    if (is.null(abundance_col)) {
      df$abundance <- 1L
    } else {
      df$abundance <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[abundance_col]]))
      df$abundance[is.na(df$abundance)] <- 0
      df$abundance <- as.integer(round(df$abundance))
    }

    df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        Sample = sample_id,
        isotype = as.character(isotype),
        isotype = trimws(isotype)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(isotype), isotype != "") %>%
      dplyr::filter(abundance > 0) %>%
      dplyr::select(Sample, isotype, abundance)
  })

  names(prepared_list) <- names(airr_list)
  prepared_list
}

# Resumen de isotipos a nivel read
summarize_isotypes_readlevel <- function(prepared_list, meta) {
  isotype_by_sample <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    lapply(names(prepared_list), function(sample_id) {
      df <- prepared_list[[sample_id]]

      if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

      df %>%
        dplyr::group_by(Sample, isotype) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(
          isotype_size = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          total = sum(isotype_size, na.rm = TRUE),
          proportion = dplyr::if_else(total > 0, isotype_size / total, 0)
        ) %>%
        dplyr::ungroup()
    })
  ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(meta, by = "Sample")

  total_reads <- isotype_by_sample %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      total = dplyr::first(total),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(meta, by = "Sample")

  list(
    isotype_by_sample = isotype_by_sample,
    total_reads = total_reads
  )
}

# Downsampling read-level
downsample_isotype_readlevel <- function(prepared_list, seed = 1234) {
  set.seed(seed)

  totals <- sapply(prepared_list, function(df) {
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(0)
    sum(df$abundance, na.rm = TRUE)
  })

  totals_positive <- totals[totals > 0]

  if (length(totals_positive) == 0) {
    stop("No hay muestras con abundancia positiva para downsampling.")
  }

  target_depth <- min(totals_positive)

  downsampled_list <- lapply(names(prepared_list), function(sample_id) {
    df <- prepared_list[[sample_id]]

    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

    expanded_isotypes <- rep(df$isotype, times = df$abundance)

    if (length(expanded_isotypes) < target_depth) {
      warning(paste(
        "La muestra", sample_id,
        "tiene menos reads que el target_depth y se omitirá."
      ))
      return(NULL)
    }

    sampled_isotypes <- sample(
      expanded_isotypes,
      size = target_depth,
      replace = FALSE
    )

    tibble::tibble(
      Sample = sample_id,
      isotype = sampled_isotypes,
      abundance = 1L
    ) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(Sample, isotype) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        abundance = sum(abundance),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  })

  names(downsampled_list) <- names(prepared_list)

  non_null <- names(downsampled_list)[!sapply(downsampled_list, is.null)]
  downsampled_list <- downsampled_list[non_null]

  attr(downsampled_list, "target_depth") <- target_depth

  downsampled_list
}

# Agrupación class-switch
assign_group <- function(isotype) {
  isotype <- trimws(as.character(isotype))

  switched <- c("IGHA", "IGHA1", "IGHA2", "IGHG", "IGHG1", "IGHG2", "IGHG3", "IGHG4", "IGHE")
  nonswitched <- c("IGHM", "IGHD")

  dplyr::case_when(
    isotype %in% switched ~ "Class-switched",
    isotype %in% nonswitched ~ "Non-class-switched",
    isotype == "undetermined" ~ "Undetermined",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

# Resumen class-switch read-level
summarize_classswitch_readlevel <- function(isotype_by_sample, meta) {
  common_samples <- intersect(unique(isotype_by_sample$Sample), unique(meta$Sample))

  if (length(common_samples) == 0) {
    stop("No hay muestras en común entre isotype_by_sample y meta.")
  }

  isotype_by_sample <- isotype_by_sample %>%
    dplyr::filter(Sample %in% common_samples)

  meta <- meta %>%
    dplyr::filter(Sample %in% common_samples) %>%
    dplyr::slice(match(common_samples, Sample))

  all_group_combos <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    Sample = common_samples,
    isotype_group = c("Class-switched", "Non-class-switched", "Undetermined", "Other")
  )

  classswitch_by_sample <- isotype_by_sample %>%
    dplyr::mutate(isotype_group = assign_group(isotype)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Sample, isotype_group) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      total_isotype_size = sum(isotype_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_reads = dplyr::first(total),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::right_join(all_group_combos, by = c("Sample", "isotype_group")) %>%
    tidyr::replace_na(list(total_isotype_size = 0, total_reads = 0)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      proportion = dplyr::if_else(
        total_reads > 0,
        total_isotype_size / total_reads,
        0
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(meta, by = "Sample")

  list(
    classswitch_by_sample = classswitch_by_sample
  )
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# PREPARACIÓN DE DATOS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Metadata FULL
meta_iso_full <- immdata_qc$meta %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Sample = sub("_airr$", "", Sample)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Sample %in% names(airr_list_isotype)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(names(airr_list_isotype), Sample))

stopifnot(identical(meta_iso_full$Sample, names(airr_list_isotype)))

# Preparar datos read-level FULL
airr_list_isotype_prepared <- prepare_isotype_readlevel(airr_list_isotype)

# FULL
sample_summaries_nt <- summarize_isotypes_readlevel(
  prepared_list = airr_list_isotype_prepared,
  meta = meta_iso_full
)

# QC FULL
check_prop_nt <- sample_summaries_nt$isotype_by_sample %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(sum_prop = sum(proportion), .groups = "drop")

stopifnot(all(abs(check_prop_nt$sum_prop - 1) < 1e-8))

# DOWNSAMPLED
airr_list_isotype_down <- downsample_isotype_readlevel(
  prepared_list = airr_list_isotype_prepared,
  seed = 1234
)

target_depth_read_iso <- attr(airr_list_isotype_down, "target_depth")

meta_iso_down <- meta_iso_full %>%
  dplyr::filter(Sample %in% names(airr_list_isotype_down)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(names(airr_list_isotype_down), Sample))

stopifnot(identical(meta_iso_down$Sample, names(airr_list_isotype_down)))

down_sample_summaries_nt <- summarize_isotypes_readlevel(
  prepared_list = airr_list_isotype_down,
  meta = meta_iso_down
)

# QC DOWNSAMPLED
check_prop_down_nt <- down_sample_summaries_nt$isotype_by_sample %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(sum_prop = sum(proportion), .groups = "drop")

stopifnot(all(abs(check_prop_down_nt$sum_prop - 1) < 1e-8))

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# TABLAS MAESTRAS DE ISOTIPOS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

isotype_master_full_nt <- sample_summaries_nt$isotype_by_sample %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Sample, isotype, isotype_size, total, proportion,
    chagas, cardiac_stage, cm_type, sex, source
  )

isotype_master_down_nt <- down_sample_summaries_nt$isotype_by_sample %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Sample, isotype, isotype_size, total, proportion,
    chagas, cardiac_stage, cm_type, sex, source
  )

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CLASS-SWITCH FULL Y DOWN
# ---------------------------------------------------------

classswitch_summary_full <- summarize_classswitch_readlevel(
  isotype_by_sample = sample_summaries_nt$isotype_by_sample,
  meta = meta_iso_full
)

classswitch_summary_down <- summarize_classswitch_readlevel(
  isotype_by_sample = down_sample_summaries_nt$isotype_by_sample,
  meta = meta_iso_down
)

# QC CLASS-SWITCH FULL
check_classswitch_sample_full <- classswitch_summary_full$classswitch_by_sample %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(sum_prop = sum(proportion), .groups = "drop")

stopifnot(all(abs(check_classswitch_sample_full$sum_prop - 1) < 1e-8))
stopifnot(sum(classswitch_summary_full$classswitch_by_sample$proportion > 1, na.rm = TRUE) == 0)

# QC CLASS-SWITCH DOWN
check_classswitch_sample_down <- classswitch_summary_down$classswitch_by_sample %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(sum_prop = sum(proportion), .groups = "drop")

stopifnot(all(abs(check_classswitch_sample_down$sum_prop - 1) < 1e-8))
stopifnot(sum(classswitch_summary_down$classswitch_by_sample$proportion > 1, na.rm = TRUE) == 0)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DATOS PARA VISUALIZACIÓN
# ---------------------------------------------------------

filter_tissue_stages <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      source = trimws(as.character(source)),
      cardiac_stage = trimws(as.character(cardiac_stage))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !(source == "Heart" & cardiac_stage %in% c("HP", "A", "B"))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      cardiac_stage = droplevels(factor(cardiac_stage))
    )
}

isotype_plot_full_nt <- filter_tissue_stages(isotype_master_full_nt)

isotype_plot_down_nt <- filter_tissue_stages(isotype_master_down_nt)

classswitch_plot_full_nt <- filter_tissue_stages(
  classswitch_summary_full$classswitch_by_sample
)

classswitch_plot_down_nt <- filter_tissue_stages(
  classswitch_summary_down$classswitch_by_sample
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# GRÁFICAS INTEGRADAS DE ISOTIPOS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# DOWNSAMPLED
p_isotype_integrated_all <- ggplot(
  isotype_plot_down_nt %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = proportion, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(isotype ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Proporción de isotipos por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Proporción"
  )

p_isotype_integrated_all
Code 
# FULL
p_isotype_integrated_all_full <- ggplot(
  isotype_plot_full_nt %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = proportion, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(isotype ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Proporción de isotipos (FULL) por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Proporción"
  )

p_isotype_integrated_all_full
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# GRÁFICAS INTEGRADAS DE CLASS-SWITCH
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# DOWNSAMPLED
p_classswitch_integrated_all <- ggplot(
  classswitch_plot_down_nt %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = proportion, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(isotype_group ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Class-switch por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Proporción"
  )

p_classswitch_integrated_all
Code 
# FULL
p_classswitch_integrated_all_full <- ggplot(
  classswitch_plot_full_nt %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = proportion, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(isotype_group ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Class-switch (FULL) por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Proporción"
  )

p_classswitch_integrated_all_full

16 Clonotipos Publicos (aa)

Code 
# =========================================================
# CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS (AA)
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CONSTRUCCIÓN DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

bcr_public_aa_list <- lapply(immdata_qc$data, function(x) {
  x %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      CDR3.aa = as.character(CDR3.aa),
      V.name  = as.character(V.name),
      J.name  = as.character(J.name),
      D.name  = as.character(D.name)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      grepl("^IGH", V.name) |
      grepl("^IGH", D.name) |
      grepl("^IGH", J.name)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(CDR3.aa), CDR3.aa != "",
      !is.na(V.name),  V.name  != "",
      !is.na(J.name),  J.name  != ""
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      public_id = paste(V.name, J.name, CDR3.aa, sep = "__")
    )
})

bcr_public_aa_data <- list(
  data = bcr_public_aa_list,
  meta = immdata_qc$meta
)

# Alinear metadata (FULL)
if (!identical(names(bcr_public_aa_data$data), bcr_public_aa_data$meta$Sample)) {
  bcr_public_aa_data$meta <- bcr_public_aa_data$meta %>%
    dplyr::slice(match(names(bcr_public_aa_data$data), Sample))
}

stopifnot(identical(names(bcr_public_aa_data$data), bcr_public_aa_data$meta$Sample))


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CONSTRUCCIÓN DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

bcr_public_aa_list_down <- lapply(down_clustered_bcr_nt$data, function(df) {

  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      CDR3.aa = as.character(CDR3.aa),
      V.name  = as.character(V.name),
      J.name  = as.character(J.name)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      grepl("^IGH", V.name) |
      grepl("^IGH", J.name)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(CDR3.aa), CDR3.aa != "",
      !is.na(V.name),  V.name  != "",
      !is.na(J.name),  J.name  != ""
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      public_id = paste(V.name, J.name, CDR3.aa, sep = "__")
    )
})

bcr_public_aa_data_down <- list(
  data = bcr_public_aa_list_down,
  meta = down_clustered_bcr_nt$meta
)

# Alinear metadata (DOWN)
non_empty_public_down <- names(bcr_public_aa_data_down$data)[
  sapply(bcr_public_aa_data_down$data, function(df) !is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0)
]

bcr_public_aa_data_down <- list(
  data = bcr_public_aa_data_down$data[non_empty_public_down],
  meta = bcr_public_aa_data_down$meta %>%
    dplyr::filter(Sample %in% non_empty_public_down) %>%
    dplyr::slice(match(non_empty_public_down, Sample))
)

stopifnot(identical(
  names(bcr_public_aa_data_down$data),
  bcr_public_aa_data_down$meta$Sample
))


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# TABLA LARGA DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(names(bcr_public_aa_data$data), function(sample_id) {
    df <- bcr_public_aa_data$data[[sample_id]]

    if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

    df %>%
      dplyr::select(public_id, CDR3.aa, V.name, J.name) %>%
      dplyr::distinct() %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Sample = sample_id)
  })
) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(bcr_public_aa_data$meta, by = "Sample")


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# TABLA LARGA DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_long_down <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(names(bcr_public_aa_data_down$data), function(sample_id) {
    df <- bcr_public_aa_data_down$data[[sample_id]]

    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

    df %>%
      dplyr::select(public_id, CDR3.aa, V.name, J.name) %>%
      dplyr::distinct() %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Sample = sample_id)
  })
) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(bcr_public_aa_data_down$meta, by = "Sample")


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# IDENTIFICAR CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_summary <- public_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(public_id, CDR3.aa, V.name, J.name) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = dplyr::n_distinct(Sample),
    samples = paste(sort(unique(Sample)), collapse = ";"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    clonotype_status = dplyr::if_else(n_samples > 2, "public", "private"),
    public_level = dplyr::case_when(
      n_samples == 1 ~ "private",
      n_samples == 2 ~ "shared_2",
      n_samples == 3 ~ "shared_3",
      n_samples >= 4 ~ "shared_4plus"
    )
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# IDENTIFICAR CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_summary_down <- public_long_down %>%
  dplyr::group_by(public_id, CDR3.aa, V.name, J.name) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = dplyr::n_distinct(Sample),
    samples = paste(sort(unique(Sample)), collapse = ";"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    clonotype_status = dplyr::if_else(n_samples > 2, "public", "private"),
    public_level = dplyr::case_when(
      n_samples == 1 ~ "private",
      n_samples == 2 ~ "shared_2",
      n_samples == 3 ~ "shared_3",
      n_samples >= 4 ~ "shared_4plus"
    )
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# NÚMERO DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS POR MUESTRA - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_per_sample_counts <- public_long %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    public_summary %>% dplyr::select(public_id, clonotype_status, n_samples),
    by = "public_id"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_total_clonotypes = dplyr::n_distinct(public_id),
    n_public_clonotypes = dplyr::n_distinct(public_id[clonotype_status == "public"]),
    n_private_clonotypes = dplyr::n_distinct(public_id[clonotype_status == "private"]),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

public_per_sample <- bcr_public_aa_data$meta %>%
  dplyr::select(Sample, chagas, cardiac_stage, cm_type, sex, source) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(public_per_sample_counts, by = "Sample") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    n_total_clonotypes = tidyr::replace_na(n_total_clonotypes, 0L),
    n_public_clonotypes = tidyr::replace_na(n_public_clonotypes, 0L),
    n_private_clonotypes = tidyr::replace_na(n_private_clonotypes, 0L),
    prop_public = dplyr::if_else(
      n_total_clonotypes > 0,
      n_public_clonotypes / n_total_clonotypes,
      0
    )
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# NÚMERO DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS POR MUESTRA - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_per_sample_down_counts <- public_long_down %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    public_summary_down %>% dplyr::select(public_id, clonotype_status, n_samples),
    by = "public_id"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_total_clonotypes = dplyr::n_distinct(public_id),
    n_public_clonotypes = dplyr::n_distinct(public_id[clonotype_status == "public"]),
    n_private_clonotypes = dplyr::n_distinct(public_id[clonotype_status == "private"]),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

public_per_sample_down <- bcr_public_aa_data_down$meta %>%
  dplyr::select(Sample, chagas, cardiac_stage, cm_type, sex, source) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(public_per_sample_down_counts, by = "Sample") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    n_total_clonotypes = tidyr::replace_na(n_total_clonotypes, 0L),
    n_public_clonotypes = tidyr::replace_na(n_public_clonotypes, 0L),
    n_private_clonotypes = tidyr::replace_na(n_private_clonotypes, 0L),
    prop_public = dplyr::if_else(
      n_total_clonotypes > 0,
      n_public_clonotypes / n_total_clonotypes,
      0
    )
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS POR NIVEL DE COMPARTICIÓN - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_level_per_sample <- public_long %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    public_summary %>% dplyr::select(public_id, public_level, n_samples),
    by = "public_id"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample, public_level) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_clonotypes = dplyr::n_distinct(public_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(bcr_public_aa_data$meta, by = "Sample")


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS POR NIVEL DE COMPARTICIÓN - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_level_per_sample_down <- public_long_down %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    public_summary_down %>% dplyr::select(public_id, public_level, n_samples),
    by = "public_id"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Sample, public_level) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_clonotypes = dplyr::n_distinct(public_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(bcr_public_aa_data_down$meta, by = "Sample")


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# RESUMEN MAESTRO - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_summary_master <- public_per_sample %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_public = mean(n_public_clonotypes, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_public = median(n_public_clonotypes, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_public = sd(n_public_clonotypes, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prop_public = mean(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_prop_public = median(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_prop_public = sd(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_prop_public = min(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_prop_public = max(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_rows = dplyr::n(),
    n_samples = dplyr::n_distinct(Sample),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# RESUMEN MAESTRO - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_summary_master_down <- public_per_sample_down %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_public = mean(n_public_clonotypes, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_public = median(n_public_clonotypes, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_public = sd(n_public_clonotypes, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prop_public = mean(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_prop_public = median(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_prop_public = sd(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_prop_public = min(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_prop_public = max(prop_public, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_rows = dplyr::n(),
    n_samples = dplyr::n_distinct(Sample),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DATOS PARA VISUALIZACIÓN - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_per_sample_plot <- public_per_sample %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = as.character(cardiac_stage)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !(source == "Heart" & cardiac_stage %in% c("A", "B", "HP"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = factor(cardiac_stage),
    cardiac_stage = droplevels(cardiac_stage)
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DATOS PARA VISUALIZACIÓN - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_down_plot <- public_per_sample_down %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = as.character(cardiac_stage)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !(source == "Heart" & cardiac_stage %in% c("A", "B", "HP"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cardiac_stage = factor(cardiac_stage),
    cardiac_stage = droplevels(cardiac_stage)
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# FORMATO LARGO PARA FIGURAS INTEGRADAS DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_plot_long_full <- public_per_sample_plot %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Sample,
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source,
    n_public_clonotypes,
    prop_public
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(n_public_clonotypes, prop_public),
    names_to = "PublicMetric",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PublicMetric = dplyr::recode(
      PublicMetric,
      n_public_clonotypes = "Número de clonotipos públicos",
      prop_public = "Proporción de clonotipos públicos"
    ),
    PublicMetric = factor(
      PublicMetric,
      levels = c(
        "Número de clonotipos públicos",
        "Proporción de clonotipos públicos"
      )
    )
  )

public_plot_long_down <- public_down_plot %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Sample,
    chagas,
    cardiac_stage,
    cm_type,
    sex,
    source,
    n_public_clonotypes,
    prop_public
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(n_public_clonotypes, prop_public),
    names_to = "PublicMetric",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PublicMetric = dplyr::recode(
      PublicMetric,
      n_public_clonotypes = "Número de clonotipos públicos",
      prop_public = "Proporción de clonotipos públicos"
    ),
    PublicMetric = factor(
      PublicMetric,
      levels = c(
        "Número de clonotipos públicos",
        "Proporción de clonotipos públicos"
      )
    )
  )


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# FIGURAS INTEGRADAS PRINCIPALES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Full

p_public_integrated_all_full <- ggplot(
  public_plot_long_full %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = Value, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(PublicMetric ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Clonotipos públicos (FULL) por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Valor"
  )

p_public_integrated_all_full
Code 
# Downsampled

p_public_integrated_all_down <- ggplot(
  public_plot_long_down %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex)),
  aes(x = cardiac_stage, y = Value, fill = chagas)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_grid(PublicMetric ~ source + sex, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Clonotipos públicos (DOWNSAMPLED) por estadio, enfermedad, matriz y sexo",
    x = "Estadio cardíaco",
    y = "Valor"
  )

p_public_integrated_all_down
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# MATRICES DE COMPARTICIÓN ENTRE MUESTRAS - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

sample_ids <- sort(unique(public_long$Sample))

public_sets <- lapply(sample_ids, function(s) {
  unique(public_long$public_id[public_long$Sample == s])
})
names(public_sets) <- sample_ids

public_overlap_matrix <- outer(
  sample_ids,
  sample_ids,
  Vectorize(function(x, y) {
    length(intersect(public_sets[[x]], public_sets[[y]]))
  })
)

public_jaccard_matrix <- outer(
  sample_ids,
  sample_ids,
  Vectorize(function(x, y) {
    sx <- public_sets[[x]]
    sy <- public_sets[[y]]
    inter <- length(intersect(sx, sy))
    union_xy <- length(union(sx, sy))
    if (union_xy == 0) return(NA_real_)
    inter / union_xy
  })
)

rownames(public_overlap_matrix) <- sample_ids
colnames(public_overlap_matrix) <- sample_ids

rownames(public_jaccard_matrix) <- sample_ids
colnames(public_jaccard_matrix) <- sample_ids


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# MATRICES DE COMPARTICIÓN ENTRE MUESTRAS - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

sample_ids_down <- sort(unique(public_long_down$Sample))

public_sets_down <- lapply(sample_ids_down, function(s) {
  unique(public_long_down$public_id[public_long_down$Sample == s])
})
names(public_sets_down) <- sample_ids_down

public_overlap_matrix_down <- outer(
  sample_ids_down,
  sample_ids_down,
  Vectorize(function(x, y) {
    length(intersect(public_sets_down[[x]], public_sets_down[[y]]))
  })
)

public_jaccard_matrix_down <- outer(
  sample_ids_down,
  sample_ids_down,
  Vectorize(function(x, y) {
    sx <- public_sets_down[[x]]
    sy <- public_sets_down[[y]]
    inter <- length(intersect(sx, sy))
    union_xy <- length(union(sx, sy))
    if (union_xy == 0) return(NA_real_)
    inter / union_xy
  })
)

rownames(public_overlap_matrix_down) <- sample_ids_down
colnames(public_overlap_matrix_down) <- sample_ids_down

rownames(public_jaccard_matrix_down) <- sample_ids_down
colnames(public_jaccard_matrix_down) <- sample_ids_down


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# HEATMAP: CONTEO DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS COMPARTIDOS - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# FILTRO de muestras con mas compartidos

sample_shared_total <- rowSums(public_overlap_matrix)

top_n_samples <- 40  # puedes ajustar (30–50 recomendado)

top_samples <- names(sort(sample_shared_total, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n_samples]

# Submatriz filtrada
mat_overlap <- public_overlap_matrix[
  top_samples,
  top_samples,
  drop = FALSE
]

mat_overlap <- log10(mat_overlap + 1)

dist_mat_public <- as.dist(max(mat_overlap) - mat_overlap)
hc_public <- hclust(dist_mat_public, method = "average")

ordered_samples_public <- rownames(mat_overlap)[hc_public$order]

mat_overlap <- mat_overlap[
  ordered_samples_public,
  ordered_samples_public,
  drop = FALSE
]

dist_mat_public <- as.dist(max(public_overlap_matrix) - public_overlap_matrix)
hc_public <- hclust(dist_mat_public, method = "average")
ordered_samples_public <- rownames(public_overlap_matrix)[hc_public$order]

# Heatmap

meta_order_public <- bcr_public_aa_data$meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(Sample %in% ordered_samples_public) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sex = dplyr::if_else(is.na(sex), "Missing", sex),
    chagas = dplyr::if_else(is.na(chagas), "Missing", chagas),
    cardiac_stage = dplyr::if_else(is.na(cardiac_stage), "Missing", cardiac_stage),
    source = dplyr::if_else(is.na(source), "Missing", source)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(ordered_samples_public, Sample))

annotation_public <- meta_order_public %>%
  dplyr::select(chagas, cardiac_stage, sex, source) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(annotation_public) <- ordered_samples_public

ann_colors_public <- list(
  chagas = c(
    Negative = "#CD2626",
    Positive = "#8B1A1A",
    Missing  = "#BDBDBD"
  ),
  cardiac_stage = c(
    HP      = "#F0FFF0",
    A       = "#C7E9C0",
    B       = "#74C476",
    `C/D`   = "#238B45",
    Missing = "#BDBDBD"
  ),
  source = c(
    Heart         = "#CD9B1D",
    `Whole blood` = "#4F94CD",
    Missing       = "#BDBDBD"
  )
)

pheatmap::pheatmap(
  mat_overlap,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  show_rownames = FALSE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  border_color = NA,
  annotation_col = annotation_public,
  annotation_row = annotation_public,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors_public,
  main = "Número de clonotipos públicos compartidos entre muestras"
)
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# HEATMAP: CONTEO DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS COMPARTIDOS - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

if (nrow(public_overlap_matrix_down) > 1) {
  dist_mat_public_down <- as.dist(max(public_overlap_matrix_down) - public_overlap_matrix_down)
  hc_public_down <- hclust(dist_mat_public_down, method = "average")
  ordered_samples_public_down <- rownames(public_overlap_matrix_down)[hc_public_down$order]

# FILTRO de muestras con mas compartidos

sample_shared_total_down <- rowSums(public_overlap_matrix_down)

top_samples_down <- names(sort(sample_shared_total_down, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n_samples]

mat_overlap_down <- public_overlap_matrix_down[
  top_samples_down,
  top_samples_down,
  drop = FALSE
]

# log transform
mat_overlap_down <- log10(mat_overlap_down + 1)

# clustering
dist_mat_public_down <- as.dist(max(mat_overlap_down) - mat_overlap_down)
hc_public_down <- hclust(dist_mat_public_down, method = "average")

ordered_samples_public_down <- rownames(mat_overlap_down)[hc_public_down$order]

mat_overlap_down <- mat_overlap_down[
  ordered_samples_public_down,
  ordered_samples_public_down,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Heatmap

  meta_order_public_down <- bcr_public_aa_data_down$meta %>%
    dplyr::filter(Sample %in% ordered_samples_public_down) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sex = dplyr::if_else(is.na(sex), "Missing", sex),
      chagas = dplyr::if_else(is.na(chagas), "Missing", chagas),
      cardiac_stage = dplyr::if_else(is.na(cardiac_stage), "Missing", cardiac_stage),
      source = dplyr::if_else(is.na(source), "Missing", source)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::slice(match(ordered_samples_public_down, Sample))

  annotation_public_down <- meta_order_public_down %>%
    dplyr::select(chagas, cardiac_stage, sex, source) %>%
    as.data.frame()

  rownames(annotation_public_down) <- ordered_samples_public_down

  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    mat_overlap_down,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    show_rownames = FALSE,
    show_colnames = FALSE,
    border_color = NA,
    annotation_col = annotation_public_down,
    annotation_row = annotation_public_down,
    annotation_colors = ann_colors_public,
    main = "Número de clonotipos públicos compartidos entre muestras (Downsampled)"
  )
}
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# HEATMAP: PRESENCIA/AUSENCIA DE TOP CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_only <- public_summary %>%
  dplyr::filter(clonotype_status == "public")

public_presence <- public_long %>%
  dplyr::filter(public_id %in% public_only$public_id) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(public_id, Sample) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(present = 1)

public_presence_matrix <- public_presence %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Sample,
    values_from = present,
    values_fill = 0
  )

mat_public_all <- as.matrix(public_presence_matrix[, -1])
rownames(mat_public_all) <- public_presence_matrix$public_id

# Ordenar muestras de mayor a menor número de clonotipos públicos presentes
ordered_samples_all <- names(sort(colSums(mat_public_all), decreasing = TRUE))

mat_public_all <- mat_public_all[, ordered_samples_all, drop = FALSE]

row_order_all <- order(rowSums(mat_public_all), decreasing = TRUE)
mat_public_all <- mat_public_all[row_order_all, , drop = FALSE]

top_n_public <- 50
mat_public_top <- mat_public_all[
  seq_len(min(top_n_public, nrow(mat_public_all))),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Reordenar columnas según la cantidad de clonotipos presentes
# dentro del heatmap final que se va a mostrar
top_col_order <- names(sort(colSums(mat_public_top), decreasing = TRUE))

mat_public_top <- mat_public_top[
  ,
  top_col_order,
  drop = FALSE
]

annotation_col_all <- meta_order_public %>%
  dplyr::filter(Sample %in% colnames(mat_public_top)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Sample, chagas, cardiac_stage, sex, source) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(annotation_col_all) <- annotation_col_all$Sample
annotation_col_all$Sample <- NULL

pheatmap::pheatmap(
  mat_public_top,
  color = c("#F7FBFF", "#08306B"),
  breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  show_rownames = FALSE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  border_color = NA,
  annotation_col = annotation_col_all,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors_public,
  main = "Presencia/ausencia de los clonotipos públicos más compartidos"
)
Code 
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# HEATMAP: PRESENCIA/AUSENCIA DE TOP CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

public_only_down <- public_summary_down %>%
  dplyr::filter(clonotype_status == "public")

public_presence_down <- public_long_down %>%
  dplyr::filter(public_id %in% public_only_down$public_id) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(public_id, Sample) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(present = 1)

public_presence_matrix_down <- public_presence_down %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Sample,
    values_from = present,
    values_fill = 0
  )

if (nrow(public_presence_matrix_down) > 0) {
  mat_public_all_down <- as.matrix(public_presence_matrix_down[, -1])
  rownames(mat_public_all_down) <- public_presence_matrix_down$public_id

# Ordenar muestras de mayor a menor número de clonotipos públicos presentes
ordered_samples_all_down <- names(sort(colSums(mat_public_all_down), decreasing = TRUE))

mat_public_all_down <- mat_public_all_down[, ordered_samples_all_down, drop = FALSE]

  row_order_all_down <- order(rowSums(mat_public_all_down), decreasing = TRUE)
  mat_public_all_down <- mat_public_all_down[row_order_all_down, , drop = FALSE]

  top_n_public_down <- 200
  mat_public_top_down <- mat_public_all_down[
    seq_len(min(top_n_public_down, nrow(mat_public_all_down))),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  annotation_col_all_down <- meta_order_public_down %>%
    dplyr::filter(Sample %in% colnames(mat_public_top_down)) %>%
    dplyr::select(Sample, chagas, cardiac_stage, sex, source) %>%
    as.data.frame()

  rownames(annotation_col_all_down) <- annotation_col_all_down$Sample
  annotation_col_all_down$Sample <- NULL

  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    mat_public_top_down,
    color = c("#F7FBFF", "#08306B"),
    breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1),
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    show_rownames = FALSE,
    show_colnames = FALSE,
    border_color = NA,
    annotation_col = annotation_col_all_down,
    annotation_colors = ann_colors_public,
    main = "Presencia/ausencia de los clonotipos públicos más compartidos (Downsampled)"
  )
}

17 GUARDADO DE RESULTADOS

Code 
# =========================================================
# GUARDADO FINAL DE RESULTADOS
# =========================================================

dir.create("figuras_finales", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("figuras_heatmaps", showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# COLAPSO POR CLUSTER - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(clustered_bcr_nt, "clustered_bcr_nt_full.rds")
write.csv(cluster_counts_nt, "cluster_counts_nt_full.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(comparison_counts_nt, "before_after_counts_nt_full.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cluster_unique_check_nt, "cluster_unique_check_nt_full.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# COLAPSO POR CLUSTER - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(down_clustered_bcr_nt, "down_clustered_bcr_nt.rds")
write.csv(down_cluster_counts_nt, "down_cluster_counts_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(comparison_counts_down_nt, "before_after_counts_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cluster_unique_check_down_nt, "cluster_unique_check_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DIAGNÓSTICO DE EXPANSIÓN CLONAL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(clone_size_df, "clone_size_df.rds")
saveRDS(clone_size_summary, "clone_size_summary.rds")

write.csv(clone_size_df, "clone_size_df.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(clone_size_summary, "clone_size_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# EXPANSIÓN CLONAL - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(imm_hom_full_nt, "imm_hom_full_nt.rds")
saveRDS(imm_hom_meta_full_nt, "imm_hom_meta_full_nt.rds")
saveRDS(long_hom_full_nt, "long_hom_full_nt.rds")
saveRDS(long_hom_full_nt_collapsed, "long_hom_full_nt_collapsed.rds")
saveRDS(hom_summary_master_full_nt, "hom_summary_master_full_nt.rds")

write.csv(imm_hom_full_nt, "imm_hom_full_nt.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(imm_hom_meta_full_nt, "imm_hom_meta_full_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(long_hom_full_nt, "long_hom_full_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(long_hom_full_nt_collapsed, "long_hom_full_nt_collapsed.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(hom_summary_master_full_nt, "hom_summary_master_full_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# EXPANSIÓN CLONAL - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(imm_hom_down_nt, "imm_hom_down_nt.rds")
saveRDS(imm_hom_meta_down_nt, "imm_hom_meta_down_nt.rds")
saveRDS(long_hom_down_nt, "long_hom_down_nt.rds")
saveRDS(long_hom_down_nt_collapsed, "long_hom_down_nt_collapsed.rds")
saveRDS(hom_summary_master_down_nt, "hom_summary_master_down_nt.rds")

write.csv(imm_hom_down_nt, "imm_hom_down_nt.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(imm_hom_meta_down_nt, "imm_hom_meta_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(long_hom_down_nt, "long_hom_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(long_hom_down_nt_collapsed, "long_hom_down_nt_collapsed.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(hom_summary_master_down_nt, "hom_summary_master_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DIVERSIDAD - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(diversity_master_full_nt, "diversity_master_full_nt.rds")
saveRDS(diversity_long_full_nt, "diversity_long_full_nt.rds")
saveRDS(div_summary_full_nt, "div_summary_master_full_nt.rds")

write.csv(diversity_master_full_nt, "diversity_master_full_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(diversity_long_full_nt, "diversity_long_full_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(div_summary_full_nt, "div_summary_master_full_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# DIVERSIDAD - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(diversity_master_down_nt, "diversity_master_down_nt.rds")
saveRDS(diversity_long_down_nt, "diversity_long_down_nt.rds")
saveRDS(div_summary_down_nt, "div_summary_master_down_nt.rds")

write.csv(diversity_master_down_nt, "diversity_master_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(diversity_long_down_nt, "diversity_long_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(div_summary_down_nt, "div_summary_master_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ISOTIPOS - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(sample_summaries_nt, "sample_summaries_nt_full.rds")
saveRDS(isotype_master_full_nt, "isotype_master_full_nt.rds")

write.csv(sample_summaries_nt$isotype_by_sample, "isotype_by_sample_nt_full.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sample_summaries_nt$total_reads, "total_reads_nt_full.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(isotype_master_full_nt, "isotype_master_full_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# ISOTIPOS - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(down_sample_summaries_nt, "sample_summaries_nt_down.rds")
saveRDS(isotype_master_down_nt, "isotype_master_down_nt.rds")

write.csv(down_sample_summaries_nt$isotype_by_sample, "isotype_by_sample_nt_down.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(down_sample_summaries_nt$total_reads, "total_reads_nt_down.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(isotype_master_down_nt, "isotype_master_down_nt.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CLASS-SWITCH - FULL
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(classswitch_summary_full, "classswitch_summary_full.rds")
write.csv(
  classswitch_summary_full$classswitch_by_sample,
  "classswitch_by_sample_full.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CLASS-SWITCH - DOWNSAMPLED
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(classswitch_summary_down, "classswitch_summary_down.rds")
write.csv(
  classswitch_summary_down$classswitch_by_sample,
  "classswitch_by_sample_down.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - FULL / QC
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(bcr_public_aa_data, "bcr_public_aa_data.rds")
saveRDS(public_long, "public_long.rds")
saveRDS(public_summary, "public_summary.rds")
saveRDS(public_per_sample, "public_per_sample.rds")
saveRDS(public_level_per_sample, "public_level_per_sample.rds")
saveRDS(public_summary_master, "public_summary_master.rds")

write.csv(public_long, "public_long.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(public_summary, "public_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(public_per_sample, "public_per_sample.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(public_level_per_sample, "public_level_per_sample.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(public_summary_master, "public_summary_master.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# MATRICES / HEATMAPS DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS - FULL / QC
# ---------------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(public_overlap_matrix, "public_overlap_matrix.rds")
saveRDS(public_jaccard_matrix, "public_jaccard_matrix.rds")
saveRDS(public_presence_matrix, "public_presence_matrix_all_public.rds")
saveRDS(public_only, "public_only_summary.rds")
saveRDS(mat_public_all, "mat_public_all.rds")
saveRDS(mat_public_top, "mat_public_top.rds")

write.csv(as.data.frame(public_overlap_matrix), "public_overlap_matrix.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(as.data.frame(public_jaccard_matrix), "public_jaccard_matrix.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(public_presence_matrix, "public_presence_matrix_all_public.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(public_only, "public_only_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(as.data.frame(mat_public_all), "mat_public_all.csv", row.names = TRUE)
write.csv(as.data.frame(mat_public_top), "mat_public_top.csv", row.names = TRUE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# FIGURAS PRINCIPALES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# QC expansión clonal
ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/01_clone_hist.png",
  p_clone_hist, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/02_clone_box.png",
  p_clone_box, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/03_clone_hist_log.png",
  p_clone_hist_log, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300
)

# Expansión clonal
ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/04_homeo_integrated_full.png",
  p_homeo_integrated_all_full, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/05_homeo_integrated_down.png",
  p_homeo_integrated_all, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/06_homeo_summary_full.png",
  p_homeo_summary_all_full, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/07_homeo_summary_down.png",
  p_homeo_summary_all, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300
)

# Diversidad
ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/08_div_integrated_full.png",
  p_div_integrated_all_full, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/09_div_integrated_down.png",
  p_div_integrated_all_downsampled, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/10_volume_integrated_down.png",
  p_volume_integrated_all, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300
)

# Isotipos
ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/11_isotype_integrated_full.png",
  p_isotype_integrated_all_full, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/12_isotype_integrated_down.png",
  p_isotype_integrated_all, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300
)

# Class-switch
ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/13_classswitch_integrated_full.png",
  p_classswitch_integrated_all_full, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "figuras_finales/14_classswitch_integrated_down.png",
  p_classswitch_integrated_all, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# GUARDAR HEATMAPS DE CLONOTIPOS PÚBLICOS COMO IMAGEN
# ---------------------------------------------------------

png("figuras_heatmaps/01_public_overlap_heatmap.png", width = 1600, height = 1200, res = 150)
pheatmap::pheatmap(
  mat_overlap,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  show_rownames = FALSE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  border_color = NA,
  annotation_col = annotation_public,
  annotation_row = annotation_public,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors_public,
  main = "Número de clonotipos públicos compartidos entre muestras"
)
Code 
dev.off()
png 
  3
Code 
png("figuras_heatmaps/02_public_presence_top_heatmap.png", width = 1600, height = 1200, res = 150)
pheatmap::pheatmap(
  mat_public_top,
  color = c("#F7FBFF", "#08306B"),
  breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  show_rownames = FALSE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  border_color = NA,
  annotation_col = annotation_col_all,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors_public,
  main = "Presencia/ausencia de los clonotipos públicos más compartidos"
)
dev.off()
png 
  3
